title: P+ Measurement Services to Host 25th Edition of #EvaluatePR, Elevating PR Standards Globally - FinancialEDGE
description: P+ Measurement Services, a prominent Media Intelligence Consultancy, is thrilled to announce the highly anticipated 25th edition of #EvaluatePR. html:
P+ Measurement Services, a prominent Media Intelligence Consultancy, is thrilled to announce the highly anticipated 25th edition of #EvaluatePR. This significant event, held quarterly, will be conducted virtually on March 28th, 2024, from 12:00 pm to 1:30 pm (West African Time). #EvaluatePR is designed to facilitate engaging discussions, offer valuable insights, and keep industry professionals abreast of the latest trends, making it a cornerstone for PR professionals globally.

#EvaluatePR has firmly established itself as a foremost global platform, uniting PR professionals, industry experts, and academics to explore the evolving landscapes of public relations, communications, and media intelligence. This edition promises to captivate participants with a distinguished lineup of guest speakers. Among them are Tonya Khoury, Director at Acumen Media Management; Lukmon Oloyede Founder & CEO BrandArena; and Beatrice Eneji, Founder & Lead Consultant at Kora & Hive.

Leveraging their wealth of experience and profound insights, they will delve into the theme “Crisis Communication Measurement: What PR and Communication Professionals Must Observe in 2024,” equipping participants with practical strategies to navigate intricate PR scenarios while underscoring the pivotal elements of transparency and trust. In a landscape where public perception and reputation can shift rapidly, mastering these skills is indispensable.

The event will be held virtually via the Google Meet platform on Thursday, March 28th, 2024 at 12:00 pm (West African Time).

Please join the discussion using the Google Meet link to participate: https://meet.google.com/diq-kfvf-hsk For inquiries, please send an email to info@pplusmeasurement.com.ng with the subject #EvaluatePR
